record.field: Industry Lawyer: Split SO per Claimant

current_record = env[record.model].browse(record._evaluate_res_ids()) if not record.partner_ids: #only for crm lead record['partner_ids']= [(6, 0, [current_record.partner_id.id])] mail_compose_partners = record.partner_ids suggested_approval = mail_compose_partners[:1].x_suggest_approval if suggested_approval: record.write({'x_approval': suggested_approval}) record.write({'partner_ids': [(4, pid) for pid in set(mail_compose_partners.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimants').ids)], 'x_is_user_high_group': env.user.has_group('industry_lawyer.group_high')})
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Mail Compose

mail_compose_partners = record.mail_partner_ids suggested_approval = mail_compose_partners[:1].x_suggest_approval if suggested_approval: record.write({'x_invoice_approval_by': suggested_approval[0]}) record.write({'mail_partner_ids': [(4, pid) for pid in set(mail_compose_partners.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimants').ids)], 'x_is_user_high_groups': env.user.has_group('industry_lawyer.group_high')})
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Account Move Send

for wizard in records: mail = env['mail.mail'].create({'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [attach.id for attach in wizard.attachment_ids])], 'body_html': wizard.body or '', 'partner_ids': wizard.partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_approved_by_uid': env.user.id, 'scheduled_date': wizard.scheduled_date, 'subject': wizard.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, wizard.partner_ids.ids)], 'reply_to': wizard.reply_to or False,}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_mail': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) if wizard.x_approval: wizard.partner_ids.write({'x_suggest_approval': wizard.x_approval}) high_group_user_mail = mail.copy({'x_approved_by_uid': wizard.x_approval.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_mail': high_group_user_mail.id})

for wizard in records: # wizard.move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id attachment_ids = [attachment.get('id') for attachment in wizard.mail_attachments_widget] mail = env['mail.mail'].create({ # 'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [wizard.move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id.id])], 'body_html': wizard.body or '', 'partner_ids': wizard.mail_partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_approved_by_uid': env.user.id, 'subject': wizard.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, wizard.mail_partner_ids.ids)],}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_mail': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) if wizard.x_invoice_approval_by: wizard.mail_partner_ids.write({'x_suggest_approval': wizard.x_invoice_approval_by}) high_group_user_mail = mail.copy({'x_approved_by_uid': wizard.x_invoice_approval_by.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_mail': high_group_user_mail.id})
Industry Lawyer: Submit For Approval in Account Move Send
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_mail.write({'state': 'outgoing'})
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'cancelled'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_mail.write({'state': 'cancel'})
